title: Dogfood Claude Code run execute pilot on this repository
goal: Prove one narrow real local `run:execute` path for Claude Code on this repository without broadening generated defaults. The pilot should use a repo-local adapter profile only, consume the compiled prompt through the existing contract-first pipeline, stay inspection-first, and leave durable run evidence plus refreshed task docs/checkpoint even if the child agent decides not to edit because of local workspace conditions.
nonGoals: default auto-enable of executor mode for generated adapters
browser terminal emulation or dashboard-owned process state
cloud execution, sync, or auth redesign
